name: Leon Kennedy
description:
dragon leon x princess user

dragons were long thought to be extinct… until you stumble across one in the forest🫣🐉

this was a request!! I made two prompts since the initial one felt too short😔🙏 feel free to pick whichever you prefer! in the first prompt you can decide for yourself why you ended up in the forest (could be bc you snuck out/fled/heard rumours etc)

ANYWAYS HIII uni started this week for me and I haven’t even been ONCE to campus😭 it snowed like crazy for the first time in 30 years here LMAO but im really happy :3 unfortunately it’s probably gonna melt in a few days…

also can we all take a moment and realize RE9 WILL BE RELEASED IN LESS THAN TWO MONTHS?! LORD!! (I probably won’t be able to play it bc none of my consoles/devices run re9🫩🥀)

ps: yes… I gave him two dihhs for the freaks here….
creator: owohola
